---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for ma-browser
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem Or Goal / 问题或目标

What real task are you trying to accomplish?

你想完成的真实任务是什么？

## Proposed Solution / 期望方案

Describe the feature or behavior you want.

描述你希望新增的能力或行为。

## Example Command Or Workflow / 示例命令或流程

```bash
ma-browser ...
```

If possible, show the command, output shape, or user flow you expect.

如果可以，请给出你期望的命令形式、输出结构或使用流程。

## Why This Matters / 为什么需要这个能力

Explain the user value, workflow gap, or agent use case.

请说明这个能力对人类用户或 AI Agent 的实际价值。

## Scope / 影响范围

Check anything relevant:

- [ ] CLI command
- [ ] Extension behavior
- [ ] Daemon behavior
- [ ] `site` adapter
- [ ] OpenClaw integration
- [ ] JSON output
- [ ] MCP / agent workflow

## Alternatives Considered / 备选方案

Describe any workaround or alternative you already tried.

描述你尝试过的替代方案或当前 workaround。

## Additional Context / 其他补充

Links, screenshots, example websites, or related issues/PRs.

相关链接、截图、示例网站，或已存在的 issue / PR。
